violations.text: The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Allergy statement was lacking on menu. Allergy statement must be added. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for to have a Rhode Island Food Safety Manager. Establishment employs individuals with food safety manager certification but there is not active RIFMC. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is not to use bar dishwasher until it is able to reach the proper chlorine sanitizer concentration. Establishment will sanitize bar dishes in kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Chowder, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Per PIC, chowder was made yesterday and was observed at 45 DF. Chowder was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Turkey breast and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date were added to food items at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2025

Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Establishment must label containers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Paper was observed stored inside of panko. Panko was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Plates were observed being stored in prep unit #3 with wastewater from prep unit dripping on plates. Plates were cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The ice mover is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. The ice mover was cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. All equipment and utensils must be stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The cutting boards in the bar area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The following equipment was observed in poor repair. -Ice machine leaking -Kitchen hand sink leaking -Prep unit #3 leaking -Sanitizer bay drain plug -Gasket for the 2-door reach-in -Gasket for the 1-door reach-in freezer.Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer, mixer, potato slicer, grill and storage shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Corrective Action - Establishment currently employs a Serve Safe Manager, he was present during time of inspection. Establishment does not have a Food Safety Manager licensed with RIDOH. Establishment must register and employee with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrective action - Slicer and can opener were corrected on site. Ice machines were emptied and turned off. Establishment to have ice machine professionally cleaned. Establishment to provide RIDOH with proof of cleaning before using. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

Clean utensils were observed stored in the splash zone of the paper towel dispenser. Utensils were, run through high temperature dishwasher. Utensils location was moved from splash zone. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

The prep sink, pasta cooker and steam cooker drainage is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The food contact surfaces of the ice machine were cleaned, and adulterated ice was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

Reduced oxygen packaged seafood was observed thawing with out air being re-introduced into the package. ROP seafood must have the packaged broken before thawing. Crab meat was observed at 28DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
Food items were observed uncovered. In multiple refrigeration units. Food items must be covered to prevent contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
The freezer door on the walk in is in poor repair. Establishment has a work order placed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2023
